title.en: Eternal Pulse of the Neon Grid

description.ko: 디지털 꿈과 크롬의 현실이 충돌하는 잠들지 않는 도시의 심장부로 뛰어드세요. NEON-V는 빛과 그림자로 세워진 수직 문명의 짜릿한 영혼을 포착합니다.
description.en: Dive into the heart of a sleepless city where digital dreams and chrome realities collide. NEON-V captures the electric soul of a vertical civilization built on light and shadow.

prompt: A sprawling futuristic cyberpunk metropolis at night, glowing neon signs in pink and cyan, rainy asphalt reflecting city lights, flying vehicles soaring between massive skyscrapers, dense urban atmosphere, high-tech low-life aesthetic, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, hyper-realistic, NEON-V style.
